title: Senator Sneakaway
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Nickname}} {{Character |type=New Republic |image= |name="Senator Sneakaway" |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]'' |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] **[[New Republic Senate/Legends|New Republic Senate]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|We all lost friends on Coruscant.''"
"''Too bad you didn't think about your friends when you ran away, Senator Sneakaway! Too bad that when you commandeered ''Alamania'', you left your friends to die!|"Senator Sneakaway" is accosted by a Phindian|}} A [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] member of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[New Republic Senate/Legends|Senate]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] escaped the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|attack]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] by commandeering the New Republic [[Warship/Legends|warship]] ''[[Alamania]]''. The [[Senator/Legends|senator's]] actions led a [[Phindian/Legends|Phindian]] [[Unidentified Phindian captain|captain]] to nickname him "'''Senator Sneakaway'''" when she confronted him and [[Senator Scramblefree|another senator]] on [[Fleet Command (space station)|Fleet Command's]] [[Fleet Command annex|annex]] in [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]]. Before letting them go, the Phindian demanded that "Senator Sneakaway" and his compatriot support a [[New Republic military appropriations bill|fleet appropriations bill]]. ==Biography== {{Quote|Tell you what. There's nothing you can do to me, but there's something you can do for me. There's a fleet appropriations bill coming up in the new session—it will be in your committee, Senator Decamp—and you're going to vote for it. Because if you don't, we won't be able to go on protecting cowards and thieves and politicians from the Yuuzhan Vong, will we? And besides, if you don't give us the money— If you don't give us the money, we'll take it. After all, we've got the guns, and we already know how brave you are around guns, don't we?|The Phindian confronts the two senators|}} [[File:Phindian.jpg|thumb|right|150px|"Senator Sneakaway" was confronted by a member of the Phindian species for his actions at Coruscant.]] By the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]—in which the [[Yuuzhan Vong galaxy|extra-galactic]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Species/Legends|species]] invaded [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]—in [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] served as a [[Senator/Legends|senator]] in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[New Republic Senate/Legends|Senate]]. That [[Standard year/Legends|year]], the Yuuzhan Vong [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|overran]] the New Republic [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. Seeking to escape the invaders, the senator commandeered the New Republic [[Warship/Legends|warship]] ''[[Alamania]]'' along with other members of the Senate.{{CSWECite|I|17|''Alamania''}} During the battle, some of the senator's friends [[Death/Legends|perished]] on Coruscant. In [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates the events of ''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]'' to [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]]. having important business on the planet [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]], the senator and a [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Senator Scramblefree|another]], who had used a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Green Squadron (New Republic)|squadron]] as his personal escort to escape Coruscant, departed a [[Consular ship/Legends|consular ship]] that had docked at the [[Fleet Command (space station)|Fleet Command]] [[Fleet Command annex|annex]] [[Orbit/Legends|orbiting]] Mon Calamari. However, before they could get far, the two senators were accosted by a [[Alcohol/Legends|drunk]] [[Phindian/Legends|Phindian]] [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|Defense Force]] [[Unidentified Phindian captain|captain]], who dubbed the Human "Senator Sneakaway" and his companion "Senator Scramblefree" for their actions on Coruscant. Confronting the pair for those deeds, which had hindered the New Republic's defense of the planet, the Phindian laughed when "Senator Sneakaway" threatened the [[Captain/Legends|captain's]] commission. The Phindian directed the senators' attention to a group of Defense Force personnel in an [[Officer/Legends|officer's]] club, all of whom shared the Phindian's opinion and were paying close attention. While the Phindian was momentarily distracted, a nervous "Senator Sneakaway" and his companion made a break for an exit, but the Phindian caught up to them. With her [[Limb/Legends|arms]] around the senators' shoulders, the Phindian demanded that the two vote for an upcoming [[New Republic military appropriations bill|fleet appropriations bill]] or the captain and her Defense Force friends would take money from them in lieu of the funds that the bill would have provided. The Phindian let "Senator Sneakaway" and "Senator Scramblefree" go, but she warned them as they left hurriedly that if either of them tried to commandeer a [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] [[Starship/Legends|ship]] again, they would be packed into an [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]] and fired at the Yuuzhan Vong. ==Personality and traits== {{Quote|Take care, Captain. You're endangering your commission.|"Senator Sneakaway"|}} To escape from the Yuuzhan Vong, "Senator Sneakaway" commandeered the warship ''Alamania'', even though doing so hindered the New Republic war effort at Coruscant. Later, on the Fleet Command annex, he grew nervous when he noticed the personnel in a nearby officer's club had their attention on him. When accosted by the Phindian, the senator threatened her commission in the Defense Force. ==Behind the scenes== "Senator Sneakaway" appeared in [[2002]]'s [[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way|''Destiny's Way'']], a novel of [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|''The New Jedi Order'']] series by [[Walter Jon Williams]]. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]'' {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:New Republic Senators]]
